prompt: generate a poster with the same visual style and layout as the reference image, featuring the message 'Buying human labeling' and incorporating similar design elements but with a fresh color scheme
prompt_refined: Generate a poster that mimics the graphic style and compositional layout of image 1. The poster should feature a velociraptor head with a paw under its chin, embodying a contemplative pose, similar to image 1. The background must retain its distinctive two-tone vertical split. The central message 'Buying human labeling' should be prominently displayed, positioned either above the velociraptor, below it, or both, consistent with meme-style text placement. Apply an entirely fresh and distinct color scheme to the entire poster, deviating from the green tones of image 1. The velociraptor should be rendered with a new primary fill color and contrasting outline/detail color, and the two background sections should utilize two new, complementary colors.
objects: Text positioned above velociraptor (consistent with meme-style text placement)
Text positioned below velociraptor (consistent with meme-style text placement)
